name: Get started with Claude Cowork
snippet: On any surface, find the message box and select "Cowork," then describe your task. To go back to a regular conversation, select "Chat."

snippet: To make the shortcuts “/,” “h then c,” “h then r,” and “q” available, enable keyboard shortcuts in the “?” dialog.

snippet: Want to work faster in Google Chat? In this tutorial, you will learn the most useful keyboard shortcuts in Google Chat step by step.
